About Organization

The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is a national level board of education in India for public and private schools.

CBSE conducts the final examinations for Class 10 and Class 12 every year.


About the Programme

The CBSE Board Supplementary Admit Card 2026 is for students who want to appear for the supplementary exam.

The supplementary exam is for students who were unable to pass the regular exam.
